subject: meeting with mark taylor and mark haedicke

emails.subject: Meeting With Mark Taylor and Mark Haedicke
emails.subject_base: Meeting With Mark Taylor and Mark Haedicke
emails.body: Meeting With Mark Taylor and Mark Haedicke Janette: I need to meet with both Marks to finalize the details on my return to work. I'm happy to come to the office to meet with them. Next week, the only day that is not good is next Tuesday. I think that we need about 1 hour. Could you please check with Mark Taylor's secretary and then let me know what works best for Mark H. and Mark T.? Thanks. Carol St. Clair EB 3892 713-853-3989 (Phone) 713-646-3393 (Fax) carol.st.clair@enron.com

emails.subject: Re: Meeting With Mark Taylor and Mark Haedicke
emails.subject_base: Meeting With Mark Taylor and Mark Haedicke
emails.body: Carol: Your meeting with Mark Haedicke and Mark Taylor is scheduled for Wednesday, December 20, at 2:00 p.m in Mark Haedicke's office. Janette Elbertson Enron North America Corp. Legal Department EB3326 Telephone: (713) 853-7906 Fax: (713) 646-2600 janette.elbertson@enron.com Forwarded by Janette Elbertson/HOU/ECT on 12/12/2000 04:40 PM Taffy Milligan 12/12/2000 01:22 PM
